steps.title: Identify the sentence's main verb
steps.content: The main verb was thereby empowered appears later in the sentence. The blank must be filled with something that doesn't create a second independent clause.

steps.title: Evaluate how each verb form functions
steps.content:
Choice D uses “having officially become,” a participle phrase that modifies Pennsylvania and allows “was thereby empowered” to be the sentence's sole main verb.

Choices A, B, and C form independent clauses (“would become,” “had become,” “became”) followed by “was thereby empowered” (another independent clause) separated by only a comma—a comma splice violation.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
